$:/plugins/kookma/utility/customize-ui/s.caption: Sidebar elements
$:/plugins/kookma/utility/customize-ui/s.text:
Choose which elements are displayed in right sidebar. <$checkbox tiddler="$:/core/ui/TopBar/menu"tag="$:/tags/TopRightBar"/> Show right sidebar toggle button
<$checkbox tiddler="$:/core/ui/SideBarSegments/search"tag="$:/tags/SideBarSegment"/> Show search bar
<$checkbox tiddler="$:/core/ui/SideBarSegments/tabs"tag="$:/tags/SideBarSegment"/> Show sidebar tabs

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/customize-ui/s.caption: Sidebar tabs
$:/plugins/kookma/utility/customize-ui/s.text:
Choose which tabs are displayed in right sidebar tabs. <$checkbox tiddler="$:/core/ui/SideBar/Open"tag="$:/tags/SideBar"/> Show Open tab
<$checkbox tiddler="$:/core/ui/SideBar/Recent"tag="$:/tags/SideBar"/> Show Recent tab
<$checkbox tiddler="$:/core/ui/SideBar/Tools"tag="$:/tags/SideBar"/> Show Tools tab
<$checkbox tiddler="$:/core/ui/SideBar/More"tag="$:/tags/SideBar"/> Show More tab

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/customize-ui/s.caption: Site options
$:/plugins/kookma/utility/customize-ui/s.text:
Choose which elements are displayed for site. <$checkbox tiddler="$:/core/ui/SideBarSegments/site-title"tag="$:/tags/SideBarSegment"/> Show site title
<$checkbox tiddler="$:/core/ui/SideBarSegments/site-subtitle"tag="$:/tags/SideBarSegment"/> Show site subtitle
<$checkbox tiddler="$:/core/ui/SideBarSegments/page-controls"tag="$:/tags/SideBarSegment"/> Show page controls

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/history.text:

* ''2.3.4'' -- 2022.10.24 -- bug fixes
* ''2.3.0'' -- 2022.08.02 -- new macros, update to Tiddlywiki 5.2.3
* ''2.1.6'' -- 2022.07.06 -- bug fixes, update to Tiddlywiki 5.2.2
* ''2.1.6'' -- 2021.05.20 -- bug fixes, new state tiddler for view fields

* ''2.1.2'' -- 2020.04.03 -- page control button issue fixed
* ''2.1.1'' -- 2020.03.25 -- page control button improved and minor issues in css fixed
* ''2.1.0'' -- 2020.03.23 -- new transclusion output for fields macro and disable drag and drop globally
* ''2.0.0'' -- 2020.03.16 -- new author-reader mode switch
* ''1.8.0'' -- 2020.03.13 -- admin panel added
* ''1.7.0'' -- 2020.02.23 -- show tiddler raw content including the macros on demand
* ''1.0.0'' -- 2019.10.13 -- stable release
* ''0.5.0'' -- 2019.10.10 -- first beta release

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/code.text: \define code(src language:xml caption) <$let code={{{[<__src__>is[tiddler]get[text]][<__src__>is[blank]then{!!text}else<__src__>]}}}> \end

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/custom-.text:
\define code-link(tiddler caption)
<$set value="$tiddler$"emptyValue={{!!title}}name=selected-tiddler> <$link to=<>/> <$macrocall language={{{[get[type]]}}}src={{{[get[text]]}}}caption=<<__caption__>>$name=code/> \end \define content(tiddler) <$set value="$tiddler$"emptyValue={{!!title}}name=selected-tiddler> <$link to=<>/> <$transclude tiddler=<>mode=block/> \end \define description(tiddler) <$set value="$tiddler$"emptyValue={{!!title}}name=selected-tiddler>
<$link to=<>/>
<$transclude tiddler=<>field=description/>
\end \define fields(tiddler) <$tiddler tiddler={{{[<__tiddler__>get[title]else{!!title}]}}}> <$link/> <$list filter='[{!!title}fields:exclude[text title created modified tags creator modifier type revision bag]]'emptyMessage='
no fields'variable=fld>
<>:<$text text={{{[{!!title}get]}}}/>
\end

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/docit.text:
\define docit()
<div class='alert alert-danger'>
''To Be Documented''. Created on <$view field=created format=date template=YYYY.0MM.0DD/>

\end

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/find.text:
\define find(text begin end output:simple mode:all)
<$vars fulltext=<<__text__>>start=<<__begin__>>stop=<<__end__>>output-macro=<<__output__>>>
<$list filter="[<fulltext>splitbefore<start>]"variable=p1>
<$list filter="[<fulltext>removeprefix<p1>]"variable=p2>
<$list filter="[<p2>splitbefore<stop>removesuffix<stop>]"variable=p3>
<$macrocall $name=<<output-macro>>p=<<p3>>/>
<$reveal type=match default=<<__mode__>>text=all>
<$macrocall text={{{[<p2>removeprefix<p3>removeprefix<stop>]}}}begin=<<start>>end=<<stop>>output=<<output-macro>>$name=find/>
</$reveal>
</$list>
</$list>
</$list>

\end
\define simple(p)<$text text=<<__p__>>/>
\define simple-list(p)<li><$text text=<<__p__>>/>

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/lorem.author: Jeremy Ruston
$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/lorem.description: creates few paragraphs of dumy text
$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/lorem.text:
\define .lorem(np:1, nw)
\define baseText()Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum.
<$let numwords={{{[<__nw__>!match[]]:else[<baseText>split[ ]count[]]}}}>
<$list filter="[<baseText>split[ ]limit<numwords>join[ ]trim[,]trim[.]addsuffix[.]]"variable=paragraph>

<$list filter=[range[1,$np$]] variable=null>
<<paragraph>>
<$list filter="[<__np__>!match[1]]"><p/></$list>
</$list>

</$list>

\end .lorem

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/reveal-.text:
\define reveal-tiddler-code(title status)
<details title="Show/hide tiddler code"class=kk-utility-details $status$>
<summary>$title$</summary>
<$macrocall $name=code src={{!!text}}language=xml/>

\end
<$set name=revealFilter tiddler="$:/config/Utility/Reveal-code-filter"field=text>
<$let systemFilter={{{[[$:/config/ViewTemplateBodyFilters/system]get[text]split[+]butlast[]]}}}showFilter="[all[current]tag[show-content]]
                    [all[current]tag[$:/tags/EditTemplate]]
                    [all[current]tag[$:/tags/ViewTemplate]] 
                    [all[current]tag[$:/tags/Macro]!prefix[$:/core]]
                    [all[current]subfilter<revealFilter>]"stylesFilter="[all[current]tag[$:/tags/Stylesheet]] [type[text/css]]"hasCodebody=[all[current]field:code-body[yes]]>
<!---->
<$list filter="[{!!title}]-[subfilter<systemFilter>]-[subfilter<showFilter>]-[subfilter<stylesFilter>]-[subfilter<hasCodebody>]+[nth[]]">
<<reveal-tiddler-code title:Code>>
</$list>
<!---->
<$list filter="[subfilter<showFilter>]-[subfilter<hasCodebody>]+[nth[]]">
  <<reveal-tiddler-code title:Code status:open>>
</$list>
</$let>

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/unique-.author: Jeremy Ruston
$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/unique-.description: creates a unique id for permanent state tiddler

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/macros/wikitex.text:
\define wikitext-example-with-html(src)
<div class=doc-example>

<$macrocall src=<<__src__>>$name=copy-to-clipboard-above-right/>

<$codeblock code=<<__src__>>/>

That renders as:

<$macrocall $name=__src__/>

... and the underlying HTML is:

<$wikify name=html text=<<__src__>>output=html>
<$codeblock code=<<html>>/>
</$wikify>

\end
\define wikitext-example(src)
<div class=doc-example>

<$macrocall src=<<__src__>>$name=copy-to-clipboard-above-right/>

<$codeblock code=<<__src__>>/>

That renders as:

<$macrocall $name=__src__/>

\end

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/reader-mode/st.text:
\define button-selector(title)button.$title$, .tc-drop-down button.$title$, div.$title$
\define hide-edit-controls()
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fclone>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fdelete>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fedit>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fnew-here>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fnew-journal-here>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fimport>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fmanager>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fnew-image>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fnew-journal>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fnew-tiddler>>{
	display: none;
}
\end
\define hide-user-selected-controls()
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fcontrol-panel>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Fsave-wiki>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fcore\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2Finfo>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fplugins\%2Fkookma\%2Fcommander\%2Fbuttons\%2Fpagecontrol>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fplugins\%2Fkookma\%2Ftrashbin\%2Fui\%2Ftoolbar-button>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fplugins\%2Fkookma\%2Ffavorites\%2Fui\%2Fbuttons\%2Fadd-remove>>,
<<button-selector tc-btn-\%24\%3A\%2Fplugins\%2Fkookma\%2Futility\%2Fui\%2FButtons\%2FViewFields>> {
	display: none;
}
\end
<$reveal state="$:/status/IsReaderMode"type=match text=yes default=no>

\rules only filteredtranscludeinline transcludeinline macrodef macrocallinline macrocallblock

<<hide-edit-controls>>
<<hide-user-selected-controls>>

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/readme.text:
; Utility plugin
The utility plugin objective is to provide set of tools for authors. These tools includes simple transclusions, show raw contents of tiddlers, reader mode, wikitext macros, show fields in view mode, linkify, code, docit, and much more!

; Code and demo
For learning plugin features, syntax, tutorial and examples see the plugin demo and code pages

* Demo: https://kookma.github.io/TW-Utility/
* Code: https://github.com/kookma/TW-Utility

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/styles/centere.description: makes storyriver centered when sidebar is closed

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/ui/Buttons/Vie.caption: {{$:/plugins/kookma/utility/images/view-fields.svg}} {{$:/language/Buttons/Utility/Caption}}
$:/plugins/kookma/utility/ui/Buttons/Vie.description: Show a toggle button for view fields
$:/plugins/kookma/utility/ui/Buttons/Vie.text:
\define stateTid()$:/state/utility/view-fields
\define show-fields-button()<$reveal type=nomatch state=<<stateTid>>text=show default=hide tag=span><$button set=<<stateTid>>tooltip={{$:/language/Buttons/Utility/Hint}}aria-label={{$:/language/Buttons/Utility/Caption}}class=<<tv-config-toolbar-class>>setTo=show><<disp-on-pagecontrols>></$button></$reveal><$reveal type=match state=<<stateTid>>text=show default=hide tag=span><$button set=<<stateTid>>tooltip={{$:/language/Buttons/Utility/Hint}}aria-label={{$:/language/Buttons/Utility/Caption}}class="""$(tv-config-toolbar-class)$ tc-selected"""setTo=hide><<disp-on-pagecontrols>>
\define disp-on-pagecontrols()<$list filter="[<tv-config-toolbar-icons>prefix[yes]]">{{$:/plugins/kookma/utility/images/view-fields.svg}}</$list><$list filter="[<tv-config-toolbar-text>prefix[yes]]"><span class=tc-btn-text><$text text={{$:/language/Buttons/Utility/Caption}}/>
<<show-fields-button>>

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/ui/ControlPane.caption: Utility
$:/plugins/kookma/utility/ui/ControlPane.text:
These settings let you customise the behaviour of Utility plugin. --- ;Show Utility setting in more sidebar :<$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/utility/ui/ControlPanel/Settings" tag="$:/tags/MoreSideBar"> Show setting in more sidebar ;Options :<$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/utility/ui/Buttons/ViewFields" tag="$:/tags/PageControls"> Enable show fields :<$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/utility/styles/tw-version" tag="$:/tags/Stylesheet"> Show the Tiddlywiki version badge :<$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/utility/styles/centered-storyriver" tag="$:/tags/Stylesheet"> Center storyriver when sidebar closed :<$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/utility/viewtemplates/reveal-code" tag="$:/tags/ViewTemplate"> Display code button at tiddler bottom
<$list filter="[[$:/plugins/kookma/utility/viewtemplates/reveal-code]tag[$:/tags/ViewTemplate]]" variable=ignore> Filter to show tiddler code (default to open)   <$edit-text tiddler="$:/config/Utility/Reveal-code-filter" field="text" tag=input default="" placeholder="enter a filter e.g. [tag[myTag]] " class="kk-ut-txt"/>
;Customize UI elements : [[Show/hide selected UI elements|$:/plugins/kookma/utility/customize-ui/modal]]

$:/plugins/kookma/utility/viewtemplates/.description: Toggle field handling in view mode
$:/plugins/kookma/utility/viewtemplates/.text:
<$reveal type=match stateTiddler stateTitle="$:/state/utility/view-fields"stateField=text default=hide text=show tag=div class=kk-ut-viewfields>
<$importvariables filter="$:/core/ui/EditTemplate">
<!---->
<$vars newFieldNameTiddler=<<qualify [[$:/temp/NewFieldName]]>>newFieldValueTiddlerPrefix=<<qualify [[$:/temp/NewFieldValue]]>>newFieldNameInputTiddler=<<qualify [[$:/temp/NewFieldName/input]]>>newFieldNameSelectionTiddler=<<qualify [[$:/temp/NewFieldName/selected-item]]>>searchListState=<<qualify [[$:/temp/searchListState]]>>storeTitle=<<qualify [[$:/temp/storeTitle]]>>>
{{||$:/core/ui/EditTemplate/fields}}
</$vars>
</$importvariables>
